samples.xml_description:
<module id="accu">
    <description>Accumulation of 4 input data and output the result after 4 cycles.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data for addition.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating readiness for new data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating when 4 input data accumulation is reached.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[9:0]">10-bit output data representing the accumulated sum.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Accumulate four valid input data_in values and calculate the output data_out by adding these four values together. There is no output when there are fewer than four data_in inputs in the interim. Along with the output data_out, a cycle of valid_out=1 will appear as a signal. The valid_out signal is set to 1 when the data_out outputs 4 received data accumulation results. Otherwise, it is set to 0.</implementation>
</module>
